tagline: Project / Portfolio Manager | Digital Transformation | Operations & Business Development
description: Building full digital ecosystems — digital identity, web, ERP, and marketing structures — for European companies entering new markets.

roles.detailed: Project & Portfolio Mgmt · Digital Transformation · Operations Management

bio: Results-driven Project & Portfolio Manager with 10+ years of international experience across UAE, Italy, and global markets. Expert in IT infrastructure, digital transformation, AI-powered operations, and cross-border business management. Proven record of improving operational efficiency by 70%, reducing project timelines by 50%+, and building complete digital ecosystems — digital identity, web, ERP, and marketing structures — for European companies entering new markets.

bullets: Leading website, branding and full digital infrastructure development for company launch
Supporting business setup, investment structuring and early-stage marketing execution
experience.desc: Leading website, branding and full digital infrastructure development for company launch.

bullets: Managing a portfolio of investor-led ventures across UAE and Italy: Arts Guerreschi, Agricola Guerreschi, XSTRO S.r.l and VALOR FZE.
Planning, scheduling, monitoring and reporting activities across all departments; supporting CEO.
Administering IT infrastructure, operating systems, servers and cloud environments across the group.
Deploying AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) to automate reporting, content workflows and operational processes.
experience.desc: Managing a portfolio of investor-led ventures across UAE and Italy. Overseeing IT infrastructure, financial reporting, and AI integration for streamlined operations.

bullets: Opened a new company 'Valor' bridging Italian and European companies into the Middle East market.
Conducted UAE market analysis, competitor research, buyer persona studies and pricing benchmarking.
Delivering end-to-end services: Business and Project management, web design & development, branding, digital identity, SEO and marketing strategy execution.
Leveraging AI tools for content generation, SEO automation, campaign analytics and client reporting.
experience.desc: Bridging Italian and European companies into the Middle East market. Delivered end-to-end business and project management, branding, and digital identity.

bullets: Established full company operations in Dubai, managed artists, sales pipeline and administration.

Managed art projects, client exhibitions and operational reporting; handled company closure and compliance.
experience.desc: Established full company operations in Dubai. Developed corporate portfolio website, branding and complete digital identity from scratch.
